name: Crafting Table
description: Place 4 wooden planks in a 2x2 square in the inventory crafting grid. Expands the grid to 3x3.

name: Stick
description: Place 2 wooden planks vertically in the crafting grid. Used for tools and torches.

name: Torch
description: Place coal above a stick in the crafting grid. Provides light.

name: Wooden Pickaxe
description: 3 planks across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Stone Pickaxe
description: 3 cobblestone across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Iron Pickaxe
description: 3 iron ingots across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Diamond Pickaxe
description: 3 diamonds across the top row and 2 sticks vertically in the middle column.

name: Wooden Axe
description: 3 planks in corners. 2 sticks in the right column.

name: Stone Axe
description: 3 cobblestone in corners. 2 sticks in the right column.

name: Iron Axe
description: 3 iron ingots in corners. 2 sticks in the right column.

name: Wooden Sword
description: 2 planks vertically and 1 stick below.

name: Stone Sword
description: 2 cobblestone vertically and 1 stick below.

name: Iron Sword
description: 2 iron ingots vertically and 1 stick below.

name: Diamond Sword
description: 2 diamonds vertically and 1 stick below.

name: Wooden Shovel
description: 1 plank above 2 sticks.

name: Stone Shovel
description: 1 cobblestone above 2 sticks.

name: Iron Shovel
description: 1 iron ingot above 2 sticks.

name: Diamond Shovel
description: 1 diamond above 2 sticks.

name: Wooden Hoe
description: 2 planks top-left and top-middle, 2 sticks in right column.

name: Stone Hoe
description: 2 cobblestone top-left and top-middle, 2 sticks in right column.

name: Iron Hoe
description: 2 iron ingots top-left and top-middle, 2 sticks in right column.

name: Diamond Hoe
description: 2 diamonds top-left and top-middle, 2 sticks in right column.

name: Bucket
description: 3 iron ingots in a V shape.

name: Furnace
description: 8 cobblestone around the edge, center empty.

name: Blast Furnace
description: Furnace surrounded by 5 iron ingots and 3 smooth stone below.

name: Smoker
description: Furnace surrounded by 4 logs.

name: Chest
description: 8 wooden planks around the edge, center empty.

name: Bed
description: 3 wool across top row and 3 planks across middle row.

name: Shield
description: 6 wood planks in Y shape plus 1 iron ingot top-middle.

name: Bow
description: 3 sticks and 3 string in a U shape.

name: Crossbow
description: 3 sticks, 2 string, 1 iron ingot, 1 tripwire hook.

name: Arrow
description: Flint on top, stick in middle, feather on bottom.

name: Paper
description: 3 sugar canes horizontally.

name: Book
description: 3 paper and 1 leather.

name: Bookshelf
description: 3 books in middle row, 6 wood planks around them.

name: Enchanting Table
description: 4 obsidian on bottom, 2 diamonds on sides, 1 book on top.

name: Anvil
description: 3 iron blocks top row, 1 iron ingot center, 3 iron ingots bottom row.

name: Grindstone
description: 2 sticks, 1 stone slab, 2 planks.

name: Smithing Table
description: 2 iron ingots above 4 planks.

name: Stonecutter
description: 3 stone and 1 iron ingot.

name: Composter
description: 7 fence posts in a U shape.

name: Loom
description: 2 string and 2 planks.

name: Cartography Table
description: 2 paper above 4 planks.

name: Iron Helmet
description: 5 iron ingots in an upside-down U.

name: Iron Chestplate
description: 8 iron ingots filling all but top-middle.

name: Iron Leggings
description: 7 iron ingots in a U shape.

name: Iron Boots
description: 4 iron ingots in a U shape.

name: Compass
description: 4 iron ingots around redstone.

name: Clock
description: 4 gold ingots around redstone.

name: Flint and Steel
description: Flint and iron ingot diagonally.

name: Glass Bottle
description: 3 glass blocks in a V shape.

name: Brewing Stand
description: 3 cobblestone across bottom, 1 blaze rod in center.

name: Cauldron
description: 7 iron ingots in a U shape.

name: Hopper
description: 5 iron ingots and 1 chest in a V shape.

name: Dispenser
description: 7 cobblestone, 1 bow, 1 redstone.

name: Dropper
description: 7 cobblestone and 1 redstone.

name: Piston
description: 3 planks, 4 cobblestone, 1 iron ingot, 1 redstone.

name: Sticky Piston
description: 1 piston and 1 slime ball.

name: Redstone Torch
description: 1 redstone above 1 stick.

name: Redstone Repeater
description: 3 stone, 2 redstone torches, 1 redstone.

name: Redstone Comparator
description: 3 stone, 3 redstone torches, 1 nether quartz.

name: Observer
description: 6 cobblestone, 2 redstone, 1 nether quartz.

name: Note Block
description: 8 wood planks around 1 redstone.

name: Jukebox
description: 8 wood planks around 1 diamond.

name: TNT
description: 5 gunpowder in X and 4 sand around them.

name: Fire Charge
description: 1 coal, 1 gunpowder, 1 blaze powder.

name: Lantern
description: 8 iron nuggets around 1 torch.

name: Soul Lantern
description: 8 iron nuggets around 1 soul torch.

name: Chain
description: 1 iron ingot above 1 iron nugget above 1 iron ingot.

name: Bread
description: 3 wheat horizontally.

name: Bowl
description: 3 planks in a V shape.

name: Spyglass
description: 1 amethyst shard above 2 copper ingots.

name: Lead
description: 4 string and 1 slime ball.

name: Iron Door
description: 6 iron ingots in two vertical columns.

name: Wooden Door
description: 6 planks in two vertical columns.

name: Trapdoor
description: 6 planks in two rows of three.

name: Fence
description: 4 planks and 2 sticks in alternating columns.

name: Fence Gate
description: 2 sticks and 4 planks in a gate shape.

name: Ladder
description: 7 sticks in an H shape.

name: Sign
description: 6 planks across top two rows and 1 stick in bottom-middle.

name: Boat
description: 5 planks in a U shape.

name: Fishing Rod
description: 3 sticks and 2 string diagonally.

name: Shears
description: 2 iron ingots diagonally.

name: Firework Rocket
description: 1 paper and 1 gunpowder. Add stars for effects.

name: Recovery Compass
description: 8 echo shards around a compass.
